title: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene
display_title: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene
wikitext:
[]: Re: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene.             Quote Post by John » Sat Oct 01, 2011 11:58 am Misato wrote: I only bring this up because I desire credit for when this happens in rebuild and the fact that you evageeks literally debated everything there is to debate about in the world of Evangelion.

[]: Re: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene.             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Oct 01, 2011 12:06 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Oct 01, 2011 12:39 pm What the hell is it with anime fans and rape? No, seriously, I really want to know at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 01, 2011 1:08 pm Asuka gets mind raped, Rei gets standard issue tentacles -- why should Ritsuko be exempt? Actually, in Rebuild she's such a minor character, I doubt that things will evolve to include her in any significant role.

[]: You talked down your wiafu. B(             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 01, 2011 6:04 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Actually, in Rebuild she's such a minor character,

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Oct 01, 2011 8:31 pm Making prisoners appear naked is a common practice because it humiliates and belittles them and does not necessarily mean said prisoners were sexually molested beforehand.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Oct 01, 2011 10:40 pm ^ I second Trajan.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Oct 01, 2011 11:43 pm Just seems like pervy fan wishing to me. There's no justifiable reason for actual rape - let alone with fucking "objects", just be blunt, you're thinking DILDOS no? - to occur in the Rebuild universe. Especially not to a secondary character such as Ritsuko. I know there's a whole legion of anime fans out there on both sides of the Pacific who get off on animated chicks being raped & they'd love nothing more than a rape hentai with Rebuild production values but come on? Like a movie that's just going to be slightly north of 100 minutes is going to waste valuable time with a secondary character being physically assaulted by what? Giant Monoliths from 2001? I bet Ritsuko won't do anything more than sprout techno babble for the whole film anyways. And that's ok. Pointless fan ...wanking?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Oct 02, 2011 1:41 am Mr. Tines wrote: Asuka gets mind raped, Rei gets standard issue tentacles -- why should Ritsuko be exempt? Actually, in Rebuild she's such a minor character, I doubt that things will evolve to include her in any significant role.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Oct 02, 2011 2:28 am A theory is based on evidence. What the OP is suggesting is mere speculation (and wishful thinking). For all we know, no such event that resembles Ritsuko's interrogation will occur at all.

[]: Kill 'em, KILL 'EM ALL!!! >BO             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 02, 2011 2:29 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: a secondary character being physically assaulted by what? Giant Monoliths from 2001?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Oct 02, 2011 6:31 am Only tenuously linked to topic but I realised the following the other day: 22 - Asuka gets mind raped 23 - Rei gets physically raped 24 - Shinji gtets emotionally raped

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Oct 02, 2011 9:40 am >Sexual assault Oh please don't Anno, don't go straight for a comedy.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Sun Oct 02, 2011 4:22 pm Trajan wrote: Making prisoners appear naked is a common practice because it humiliates and belittles them and does not necessarily mean said prisoners were sexually molested beforehand.

[]: Re: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene.             Quote Post by Viking » Thu Oct 06, 2011 6:46 pm Misato wrote: [..]I only bring this up because I desire credit for when this happens in rebuild [..]

[]:             Quote Post by Draconis » Sun Oct 09, 2011 11:29 pm Well, if it DOES end up happening, it'd just be truth in television (unfortunately). I hope for no such thing; but if it does, I definitely hope they don't show anything.

[]: Re: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene.             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Oct 14, 2011 1:57 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Seriously, it's not only never been proven but it's also only ever been very very poorly and tenuously argued.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Oct 14, 2011 3:44 pm Of course Ritsuko was raped. It's not just the fact that I really, really, really want that to be the case. (She is after all, a mouthy little blonde and needs to be put in her place.) It's essential for her kinship with Misato, who was also raped. It's clear from implication that Misato was sexually molested by her father and her relationship with Kaji was an attempt to relive her abuse in a safe environment. Ultimately she couldn't take the stress and that's the reason she dumped him. "But Muggy," you're no doubt asking, "how could Misato and Ritsuko be partners in rape survival when Ritsuko wasn't raped until the end of the series?" Why isn't it obvious? The reason Ritsuko's father is never seen is because he raped her, and her mom gave him the boot (possibly off a building). This is why she can take Seele's rape with such dignity, because she's already withstood a far greater humiliation. After all, her trust is far more fragile than her vag. That's why the rape had no affect on her, but her betrayal by Gendo did. Since childhood, she's had little respect for her body (there's evidence that she's bulimic, but I won't go into that here). Point is, although the rape itself meant nothing , (and is ultimately superfluous) the trust of being taken advantage of is what broke her, and the initial betrayal by a loved one is the reason she latched onto Gendo in the first place. (Therefore, it's obvious her mom had to have also been raped by somebody, because of all the parallels they share. It could have been her ex-husband, to tie it more neatly into the Gendo connection.) In essence, Eva is all about rape. The rape of otaku by the apathy of their wretched lifestyle, the rape of the Japanese by their failing economy. Hell, the white moon basically popped Earth's cherry, making First Impact is itself a glorious, apocalyptic rape metaphor and Second Impact is the earth's revenge rape of mankind. Now, since everyone is raped, by transference we can assume that our hero Shinji, was also raped. No doubt by his old teacher, who we never see because Shinji's repressing all the painful memories. I'm sure Kaworu also probably took advantage of Shinji in his sleep, but that's only conjecture. I'd like to build off of Reichu's old theory that Kaworu is made from Misato's dad's DNA--in the same way Rei is made from Yui's-- and therefore a rapist reborn, but that theory is much too silly for such serious and in-depth analysis as mine. Also, Seele raped Yui, but that was okay, because Fuyutski raped her first and she liked it.

[]: Re: Theories on possibly new Ritsuko torture scene.             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Oct 14, 2011 6:12 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Oct 15, 2011 1:18 am What an excellent and insightful post Mugwump. It has totally change my entire outlook on the series.
